title: Freshly Roasted Australian Fish Wrap
description: A light and delicious Australian dish featuring roasted fish, cilantro, and leaf wrap steam, perfect for a quick lunch or snack, onion and garlic free.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
Line a baking sheet with parchment paper and place the fish fillets on it.
Drizzle the olive oil over the fish and season with salt and pepper.
Roast the fish in the oven for 12 minutes or until cooked through.
While the fish is cooking, prepare the cilantro and lemon juice mixture.
Mix the chopped cilantro and lemon juice in a small bowl.
Once the fish is done, let it cool for a minute or two.
Assemble the wraps by placing a piece of fish on each lettuce leaf, topping with diced tomato and a spoonful of the cilantro mixture.
